name: Inah Superior Grape Juice Combo Deal 2
description: They are so good, why not get all Inah Superior 100% alcohol-free Grape Juices with a combo discount: 1x Inah Shiraz, 1x Inah Merlot, 1x Inah Cabernet Sauvignon and 1x Inah Sauvignon Blanc. Inah is a Halaal certified product.
extras: {"ingredients":"Inah pride themselves on being the pioneers in producing a grape juice with the complexity of wine. Situated in the heart of the South Africa’s premier cultivar region, Stellenbosch, their grapes are carefully handpicked from the best farms to produce a grape juice that embodies not only the profound flavours of the grape, but also the region in which they are grown.\n\nEach one of our Inah Superior Grape Juices contains the unique and subtle flavours of the wine cultivar grapes, in a juice that contains absolutely no alcohol. Through their unique natural extractions process, they have released all the nutrition found in wine grapes into Inah giving it not only the complexity of flavours found in wine, but also its health benefits with none of the side effects of alcohol."}

name: Noon Gun The General Non-Alcoholic Ipa Beer
description: The General is Noon Gun’s 18-Pounder Session IPA (India Pale Ale) alcohol-free beer twin. Brewed the same way, born the same way. Thus far, no one has been able to tell the difference between the sibling variants. Awarded Double Gold at the Aurora International Taste Challenge.
extras: {"ingredients":"Noon Gun Brewery’s story began in 2015 when they converted a behemoth of a storage facility into a beer-brewing powerhouse. As 2017 progressed, their vision materialised in front of their eyes, and the various gold and amber liquid legacies have been made their way into taprooms, restaurants, outlets and bars around the Western Cape – and now, across South Africa.  In 2018 Noon Gun began winning local awards for their beer range, and in 2019 they became internationally recognised with two of their beers winning top awards at the European Beer Challenge in London."}

name: Absolute Zero Dry Non-Alcoholic Sparkling Wine
description: Absolute Zero Dry is a delicious non-alcoholic champagne with tiny festive bubbles, crisp tropical flavours on the palate and well balanced with a smooth finish. After vinification this premium sparkling wine was de-alcoholised with the latest spinning cone technology.
extras: {"ingredients":"Van Loveren has been in the Retief family since 1937 when Hennie Retief snr acquired the land in the Robertson Valley and named it after Christina van Loveren, an ancestor of his new bride, Jean van Zyl. From humble beginnings Van Loveren has grown to become South Africa's leading family-owned winery, known for their consistency, award-winning wines as well as innovation."}

name: Noughty Rouge Syrah Non-Alcoholic Wine
description: Noughty Rouge Shiraz De-Alcoholised Wine combines red fruit flavours with a little spice, upheld by elegant texture, silky tannins and well-balanced acidity.
extras:
{"ingredients":"Amanda Thomson the Founder and CEO of Thomson & Scott was voted one of Business Insider’s Coolest People in Food & Drink 2019. Leading the global shift to alcohol-free drinking, Thomson launched game-changing Noughty alcohol-free, organic, vegan, and low sugar wines. 

Amanda is also driving the debate for greater transparency in wine production and labelling and wants consumers to push to know what’s in their bottle. Raised on a plant-based, no sugar diet by her health-conscious mother, Thomson has always had a keen interest as to what’s in her food. 

Formerly an Arts Broadcaster at the BBC, Thomson moved her young family to Paris and studied for her Diploma in Wine at the renowned Le Cordon Bleu School where she was Entrepreneur of the Year 2017 and an EY Winning Woman.  Thomson is also a Department of International Trade Export Champion. 

Thomson & Scott’s Noughty now sells to the world’s coolest bars, restaurants, hotels and spas in key territories including Australia, Europe, North America and now South Africa."}

Inah is a Halaal certified product.

name: Babylonstoren Alcohol-Free Sparkling Grape Juice
description: A light, crisp, Non-Alcoholic Sparkling Grape Juice that is fruit driven and juicy. Refreshing with lovely guava, pineapple and winter melon flavours, rounded off with a hint of fresh gooseberries and packham pear undertones.
extras: {"ingredients":"With the Simonsberg, Du Toitskloof and Franschhoek mountains as backdrop, Babylonstoren's garden is majestic. Dating back to 1692, the fortunes of this historic fruit and wine farm took a turn ten years ago when it fell under the gaze of former magazine editor Karen Roos. Her passion for historic Cape Dutch style led to an authentic yet contemporary restoration that projects the farm into the future.\n\nIn 1692, Babylonstoren farm was granted to burgher Pieter van der Byl who planted the first vineyards on the farm and altered the water courses to provide irrigation. Some of the farm’s earliest structures from that time remain on the farm today, with Babylonstoren’s Cape Dutch werf (farmyard) typical of the architectural style popular in the 17th and 18th centuries. As such it is considered to be one of the best preserved farmyards in the Cape today."}
